description: A curated, community-driven list of tech meetups, startup events, and networking opportunities in Hyderabad, India. ⭐ Support this project by giving it a star and sharing it with the Hyderabad tech community! 📢 Join our Telegram Channel (@eventshyderabad) to get instantly notified whenever a new event is created/hosted!
title: Hyderabad Tech Meetups & Startup Events - GitHub
